strategy: Hit with Life; he takes +50% and resists Death 80%.
He is stunable and beguilable; stun or beguile to control him.
He summons a random understudy minion; clear it or focus MacDeath.
Do not cast Globals or Healing spells; either makes him drop a -75% Doom and Gloom that cripples your own healing.
Blade up, avoid Globals and heals, then finish with one Life hit.
cheatNotes: Joining after turn two gets Feint, Curse, and Hex stacked on you; enter on time.
He summons a random understudy minion; deal with it or race him down.
Casting a Global or a heal makes him cast a -75% Doom and Gloom, gutting your own healing; avoid both.
